চক্র ২ (Chokro 2) ওয়েব সিরিজ ডাউনলোড ফ্রিতে (২০২৬) – Full HD

PUH-BrianMartell the measured 1/α ≈ 137.036 has an integer part that falls straight out of E₈ Lie algebra in two independent ways: •  dim(E₇) + rank(E₈)/2 = 133 + 4 = 137 •  kissing number 240 − dim(E₇) + h_E₈ = 240 − 133 + 30 = 137 Both combinations use only established E₈ invariants (dimension of E₇, rank of E₈, kissing number, Coxeter number) and tie directly to Theorems 167 and 168. The fractional part +0.036 is the standard QED vacuum-polarisation correction from the Planck Shell down to low energies — nothing new, just ordinary running. This Gist is explicitly labelled as exploratory (integer match is exact and Lie-algebraic; the bare-coupling interpretation at the Planck Shell is motivated but still needs the explicit condensate-profile calculation for Zenodo). It slots cleanly into the tower: same E₈ that gave spin-1/2 (167), Gertsenshtein mode-switching (168), and the exact 1/540 normalisation (168 addendum).
